SEARCH
Package taskmanager.api

Interface TaskManager

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultTaskManager
public interface TaskManager
Main facade for the Smart Task Manager. Other developers will use this to interact with the system.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder
    Builder interface for constructing a TaskManager instance step-by-step.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addTask(Task task)
    Adds a new task to the system.
    static TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder
    builder()
    Creates a new builder instance for constructing a TaskManager.
    reactor.core.publisher.Mono<WeatherForecast>
    fetchWeather(String location)
    Fetches weather information for a given location asynchronously.
    SchedulePlanner
    getPlanner()
    Returns the scheduling planner responsible for generating task recommendations.
    List<Task>
    getTasks()
    Retrieves all tasks currently stored in the system.
    void
    removeTask(String taskId)
    Removes a task from the system using its unique ID.

  • Method Details

    • addTask

      void addTask(Task task)
      Adds a new task to the system.
      Parameters:
      task - the task to be added

    • removeTask

      void removeTask(String taskId)
      Removes a task from the system using its unique ID.
      Parameters:
      taskId - the ID of the task to remove

    • getTasks

      List<Task> getTasks()
      Retrieves all tasks currently stored in the system.
      Returns:
      a list of all tasks

    • fetchWeather

      reactor.core.publisher.Mono<WeatherForecast> fetchWeather(String location)
      Fetches weather information for a given location asynchronously. This method does not block the calling thread and returns a Mono that will emit the weather forecast once available.
      Parameters:
      location - the location to fetch weather for
      Returns:
      a Mono containing the weather forecast

    • getPlanner

      SchedulePlanner getPlanner()
      Returns the scheduling planner responsible for generating task recommendations.
      Returns:
      the SchedulePlanner instance

    • builder

      static TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder builder()
      Creates a new builder instance for constructing a TaskManager.
      Returns:
      a TaskManagerBuilder for configuring and building the system
